PowerShell(cd "C:\\01_WorkSpace\\Cro-co\\frontend"; $auditJson = npm audit --json 2>&1 | Out-String; $d = $auditJson | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== SUMMARY ==="; Write-Output "total: $\($d.metadata.vulnerabilities.total\)"; Write-Output "critical: $\($d.metadata.vulnerabilities.critical\)"; Write-Output "high: $\($d.metadata.vulnerabilities.high\)"; Write-Output "moderate: $\($d.metadata.vulnerabilities.moderate\)"; Write-Output "low: $\($d.metadata.vulnerabilities.low\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== VULNERABILITIES ==="; foreach \($key in $d.vulnerabilities.PSObject.Properties.Name\) { $v = $d.vulnerabilities.$key; Write-Output "--- $key ---"; Write-Output "severity: $\($v.severity\)"; Write-Output "isDirect: $\($v.isDirect\)"; Write-Output "via: $\($v.via | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -is [string]\) { $_ } else { $_.title } } | Out-String\)"; Write-Output "fixAvailable: $\($v.fixAvailable | Out-String\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\01_WorkSpace\\Cro-co\\frontend"; $auditJson = npm audit --json 2>&1 | Out-String; $d = $auditJson | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($key in $d.vulnerabilities.PSObject.Properties.Name\) { $v = $d.vulnerabilities.$key; Write-Output "=== $key ==="; Write-Output "  severity: $\($v.severity\)"; Write-Output "  isDirect: $\($v.isDirect\)"; Write-Output "  range: $\($v.range\)"; Write-Output "  fixAvailable: $\($v.fixAvailable | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; Write-Output "  nodes: $\($v.nodes | Out-String\)"; foreach \($via in $v.via\) { if \($via -is [PSCustomObject]\) { Write-Output "  via CVE/GHSA: $\($via.url\)"; Write-Output "  via title: $\($via.title\)"; Write-Output "  via range: $\($via.range\)"; Write-Output "  via severity: $\($via.severity\)" } } })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\01_WorkSpace\\Cro-co\\frontend"; $auditJson = npm audit --json 2>&1 | Out-String; $d = $auditJson | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($key in $d.vulnerabilities.PSObject.Properties.Name\) { $v = $d.vulnerabilities.$key; $fix = $v.fixAvailable; if \($fix -is [PSCustomObject]\) { Write-Output "$key -> fixAvailable.name: $\($fix.name\) version: $\($fix.version\) isSemVerMajor: $\($fix.isSemVerMajor\)" } else { Write-Output "$key -> fixAvailable: $fix" } })
